normalization_point: Alteogen-style SC formulation can be Green-capable only after royalty/adoption/commercial evidence follows approval and partner confirmation.
Blockbuster life-extension royalty needs actual conversion and royalty visibility, not only a patent-cliff story.
Yuhan-style oncology commercialization needs scripts and royalty, not only FDA approval or a global partner.
Celltrion US manufacturing is Stage 2 until utilization, PBM/formulary, US sales, and OPM/FCF confirm.
Biosimilar commercialization needs prescription, PBM/formulary, margin, and sales evidence after approval.
Hugel-style botulinum US entry needs actual penetration and safe licensed channels before Green.
Classys-style aesthetic devices are Green-capable only when export, procedure, consumable, OPM, and FCF repeat.
ABL Bio-style license platforms are capped before milestone, clinical progress, royalty, and cash runway visibility.
GLP-1 generic is Stage 1/2 until patent/regulatory clearance and commercial sales confirm.
Lunit/JLK/Deepnoid-style medical AI needs paid deployment, reimbursement, and recurring revenue after validation.
Approval, license, and AI performance are not Stage 3 evidence before commercialization.
CMC and CRL issues are hard 4C gates for drug and formulation platforms.
SC formulation and GLP-1 generic stories must be capped when patent status is unresolved.
Biotech disclosure confidence is capped when royalty, contract amount, prescription, or reimbursement fields are missing.
Aesthetic device and botulinum candidates need safe licensed channels; safety breaks are hard caps.
